nodes.label: Tests for claude-code provider in LLMClient.
Tool calls render as synopsis and tool results are included truncated.
Assistant with no free text but tool_calls renders as '[ran: ...]'.
Tool results longer than the limit are suffixed with a remainder count.
Create a mock proc + _pool_popen for claude-code tests.
No api_key configured → no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env (uses OAuth).
api_key configured → ANTHROPIC_API_KEY passed to CC.
base_url configured → ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL passed to CC with         localhost tra
Preempts arriving during a sentinel session (_compact, _memory_extract)     must
Deterministic check used at result-time to decide whether to break     or wait f
preempt user msg followed by assistant → 'done'.
preempt is the last entry, no assistant after → 'pending'.          This is the
CC hasn't read stdin yet — preempt isn't recorded.
Two preempts, only first answered → second is pending.
CC may store preempt with a multi-agent catchup prefix —         substring match
User message content can be a list of blocks (multimodal).
When a preempt is injected via stdin BEFORE CC emits `result`, CC     may alread
jsonl status 'done': CC integrated the preempt into the just-         emitted as
jsonl status stays 'unread' across the poll window: CC never         acknowledge
Without pending preempts, first result must end the stream —         don't intro
force=True must kill the container-side claude CLI, not just the     host docker
_kill_cc_hard MUST kill by captured container-side PID, not by     argv-matching
Regression for the singleton-clobber bug: when a second stream         spawns mi
Test that claude-code and gemini-cli are in PROVIDERS.
